reach_why: Mostly extends familiar skepticism about AI originality, benchmarks, and interpretation rather than opening clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links fallible originality tests, expansion-compression creativity, and true-but-unintegrated claims into one epistemic caution framework.
falsifiable_why: Some parts are testable, but core claims remain underdetermined by ambiguous novelty criteria and uninterpretable true premises.
explanation: Novelty in AI may be real, but our methods for recognizing and classifying it are fallible.
